landing.title: GitHub Enterprise Managed Users
landing.subtitle: Step-by-step guide to configure EMU with SSO, SCIM provisioning, and GitHub Copilot.
landing.idpEntraHint: Recommended — supports SAML and OIDC with Conditional Access
landing.idpOktaHint: Supports SAML only for GitHub EMU
landing.orgsIncludeHint: Includes creating organizations, repos, and enterprise policies
landing.orgsSkipHint: Focus on SSO, SCIM, and Copilot seat assignment
landing.copilotIncludeHint: Includes enabling, policies, seat assignment, and IDE setup
landing.copilotSkipHint: Guide will only cover SSO and SCIM provisioning
landing.ghasIncludeHint: Includes code scanning, secret scanning, Dependabot, and security overview
landing.choosePrompt: Choose your enterprise type to get started:
landing.withDRDesc: Your enterprise data is stored in a specific geographic region. Each enterprise gets its own GHE.com subdomain with isolated data storage.
landing.withoutDRDesc: Standard GitHub Enterprise Cloud on github.com. Your enterprise is managed within the global GitHub platform without region-specific data guarantees.

sidebar.enterpriseHint: Enter your enterprise name — all URLs and links in the guide will update automatically.
sidebar.enterpriseUrlHint: Enter your enterprise name above — all URLs will appear here automatically.
sidebar.noDocsHint: No documentation links for this step.

step.enterpriseBannerText: enter it below to replace all URL placeholders in this step.
step.subject: Subject:
step.congratulations: 🎉 Congratulations! Your EMU enterprise is fully configured.

tour.deploymentModeContent: Switch between Data Residency (GHE.com) and Standard (github.com) Enterprise configurations. This changes all steps and URLs accordingly.
tour.stepNavigationContent: Track your progress through the guide. Each step has sub-tasks — the progress counter shows how many you've verified. Click any step to jump to it.
tour.configPanelContent: Change your Identity Provider (Entra ID / Okta), SSO protocol, and toggle optional sections like Copilot, Organizations, and GHAS at any time.
tour.enterpriseNameContent: Enter your enterprise name here — all URLs and links throughout the guide will update automatically with your actual enterprise values.
tour.enterpriseUrlsContent: Your generated enterprise URLs (SSO, SCIM, ACS, etc.) appear here. Click the copy icon on any URL to copy it to your clipboard.
tour.stepInstructionsContent: Each step has detailed sub-tasks. Click to expand, follow the instructions, then check the verification box to mark it complete.

email.subjectDr: Welcome to GitHub Enterprise - YOUR-ENTERPRISE on GHE.com
email.intro: You now have access to our **GitHub Enterprise** environment. Here is everything you need to get started.
email.accessInstructions: Navigate to the URL above. You will be redirected to **{{idp}}** for single sign-on. Sign in with your **corporate credentials**. Your GitHub username will be in the format **username_SHORTCODE**, automatically provisioned from your {{idp}} account.
email.copilotIntroDr: **GitHub Copilot** is available for code completions and chat. Because our enterprise uses **GHE.com** (data residency), you must configure the enterprise URL in your IDE before signing in.
email.copilotIntroNoDr: **GitHub Copilot** is available for code completions and chat in your IDE.
email.copilotVsCodeDr: **VS Code** (latest: v1.100+): Open Settings (Ctrl+, / Cmd+,), search "enterprise", set "Github-enterprise: Uri" to https://YOUR-ENTERPRISE.ghe.com. Then search "copilot", under "GitHub > Copilot: Advanced" click "Edit in settings.json" and add "authProvider": "github-enterprise". Save and sign in when prompted.
email.copilotVsCodeNoDr: **VS Code** (latest: v1.100+): Install "GitHub Copilot" and "GitHub Copilot Chat" extensions. Click the Copilot icon in the status bar, click "Sign in to GitHub" and complete SSO with your managed user account (**username_SHORTCODE**).
email.copilotVsDr: **Visual Studio 2026** (latest: v18.0+): Go to File > Account Settings > Add > "Add GitHub Enterprise account" (NOT "Add GitHub account"). Enter https://YOUR-ENTERPRISE.ghe.com and complete SSO sign-in.
email.copilotVsNoDr: **Visual Studio 2026** (latest: v18.0+): Go to File > Account Settings, sign in with your GitHub managed user account and complete SSO.
email.copilotJetBrainsDr: **JetBrains IDEs** (2025.1+, e.g. IntelliJ IDEA, Rider, WebStorm): Install "GitHub Copilot" plugin. Go to Settings > Languages & Frameworks > GitHub Copilot, set Auth Provider to "GitHub Enterprise", enter https://YOUR-ENTERPRISE.ghe.com, and sign in.
email.copilotJetBrainsNoDr: **JetBrains IDEs** (2025.1+, e.g. IntelliJ IDEA, Rider, WebStorm): Install "GitHub Copilot" plugin, click "Sign in to GitHub" when prompted, and complete SSO.
email.importantLine: This is a **managed user account**, separate from any personal GitHub.com account. You cannot create personal repositories or contribute to public open-source projects outside the enterprise. Your account is **provisioned and deprovisioned automatically** via {{idp}}.
email.closingSupport: Questions or sign-in issues? Contact **[YOUR IT SUPPORT CHANNEL]**.
